caption: A man with blonde hair wearing white headphones and a navy blue t-shirt is positioned in front of a computer monitor. He is located in a room with a brick wall and a decorated Christmas tree visible in the background. The man appears highly energized and expressive, with his mouth open in a shout and his arm raised. A monitor behind him displays a blue interface with the number "20" visible. The entire scene is overlaid with a stylized, semi-transparent blue and purple atmospheric effect that resembles swirling smoke or clouds, along with vertical film-grain textures. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts slightly as he continues to shout and gesture with his right arm, while the overlapping smoky visual effects drift and shift across the screen.
